title: PatternFly Design System from Red Hat
content: # Red Hat Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe PatternFly from Directories: Components: PatternFly is an open-source Design System maintained by Red Hat, fostering consistency and usability in enterprise products. It provides clear standards, guidance, and tools that help designers and developers work together more efficiently and build better user experiences. Design System includes foundations, components, layouts, patterns, accessibility guidelines, UX writing style guide, and extensions that provide reusable code for consistency across different platforms.
